objects.role: Dual-role Slack service for outbound posts and inbound emoji or approval action events.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Slack messages, DMs, channel posts, and inbound interaction events.
objects.behavior: When asked to send a message, post to the specified Slack destination including #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, #payroll-ops, or an employee DM. When asked to send a review request, post to the specified Slack approval destination. When asked to post an approved farewell, post to the specified Slack channel. When emoji reaction event arrives, forward it to backfill-tracking via peer message. When approval action event arrives, forward it to farewell-approval via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward Slack emoji reaction events related to Backfill Requests tracking updates
Forward Slack approval action events for farewell review decisions

event_sources: slack: emoji reaction added
slack: approval action submitted

objects.role: Read service for BambooHR employee and employment data lookups.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves BambooHR records on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for employee profile, tenure, work location, employment status, or current termination and severance-related fields, return the requested BambooHR data. When answering queries, call the `bamboohr_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Read service for generating drafted documents and summaries from provided prompts.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves generated text on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for a separation agreement draft, generate a draft using the provided termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context. When asked for an exit survey TLDR and action steps, generate concise summary text and recommended actions from the enriched feedback payload. When answering queries, call the `chatgpt-generation_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Write service for recording termination and severance-related updates into BambooHR.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound BambooHR update requests for termination details, severance tracking fields, and related status changes.
objects.behavior: When termination details are received, write the employee termination type and last working day to BambooHR. When severance payment details are received, write the payment tracking details and severance status to BambooHR.

objects.role: Write service for creating and tracking Backfill Requests records in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Airtable record writes for Backfill Requests and subsequent status updates.
objects.behavior: When a backfill request is received, create a tracking record in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base, Backfill Requests table. When a backfill status update is received, update the corresponding Backfill Requests record with the new emoji-derived status.

objects.role: Business logic object that applies offboarding rules to each termination request.
objects.state_description: Tracks active offboarding cases with employee identity, termination type, last working day, notification status, BambooHR update status, voluntary or involuntary branch, and linked downstream tasks.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding request arrives, classify it as voluntary or involuntary using the submitted termination type. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare customized action messages and send to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a termination update for BambooHR. When the departure is voluntary, prepare a Slack DM to the employee with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link. When the departure is involuntary, request employee tenure and work location data needed for severance evaluation. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a backfill tracking request for Talent Acquisition.

peers.relationship: Send customized offboarding action messages to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops, and send voluntary-departure DM content to the employee
Send termination details for BambooHR recording
Send involuntary termination cases for severance evaluation
Send accepted offboarding cases to create and manage backfill tracking

objects.role: Business logic object that applies severance rules and prepares separation-agreement inputs.
objects.state_description: Tracks involuntary termination cases with tenure, work location, severance eligibility, severance amount, agreement draft status, and payment tracking requirements.
objects.behavior: When an involuntary termination case arrives, use tenure and work location to determine severance eligibility and calculate severance according to policy. When severance is due, prepare structured inputs for a separation agreement draft. When severance is due, prepare severance tracking details for BambooHR. When severance is not due, mark the case as no-severance-required.

peers.relationship: Request employee tenure, work location, and related employment facts needed for severance calculation
Request a separation agreement draft for eligible severance cases
Send severance payment tracking details and severance status for BambooHR recording

objects.role: Business logic object that enriches exit survey responses and determines follow-up actions.
objects.state_description: Tracks exit survey cases with raw responses, enriched employee context, generated TLDR, recommended action steps, exit interview request status, and notification status.
objects.behavior: When an exit survey submission arrives, enrich the feedback with BambooHR employee data. When enriched feedback is available, prepare a TLDR and action steps. When the survey indicates an exit interview request, identify that follow-up is required and prepare a notification for the assigned People Business Partner.

peers.relationship: Request BambooHR context needed to enrich exit survey feedback
Request TLDR and action-step generation from enriched exit feedback
Send exit interview request notifications for the assigned People Business Partner

objects.role: Business logic object that manages backfill request creation and Slack-emoji-driven status interpretation.
objects.state_description: Tracks backfill cases with employee departure context, Airtable record linkage, Talent Acquisition status, and most recent Slack emoji-derived signal.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding case arrives, prepare a Backfill Requests record with employee and vacancy context. When a Slack emoji reaction event arrives for a tracked backfill item, interpret the emoji according to backfill status rules and prepare the corresponding Airtable status update.

peers.relationship: Send new Backfill Requests records and emoji-derived status updates to Airtable

objects.role: Business logic object that applies review and approval rules to farewell messages before posting.
objects.state_description: Tracks farewell message submissions with review status, approver routing, decision history, approved content, and posting status.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, determine the required review path and prepare a review request. When an approval action arrives, update the decision status. When a farewell message is approved, prepare the approved message for posting to Slack. When a farewell message is rejected or needs edits, mark the submission accordingly and retain the review history.

peers.relationship: Send farewell review requests to the Slack approval destination and send approved farewell messages for posting to the designated Slack channel

objects.role: Write service for notifying the assigned People Business Partner about requested exit interviews.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound People Business Partner notifications and delivery attempts.
objects.behavior: When an exit interview request notification is received, send the notification to the assigned People Business Partner with employee context and requested follow-up.

steps: When an employee offboarding request is submitted through Google Forms, the workflow records the employee name, termination type, and last working day, then classifies the departure as voluntary or involuntary based on the submitted termination type.

For every accepted offboarding request, the workflow immediately sends customized Slack notifications to the relevant operational teams, including HR, IT, and payroll, with team-specific action guidance tied to the departure details.
After intake, the workflow writes the termination information into BambooHR, updating the employee’s termination type and last working day.

If the termination is involuntary, the workflow looks up the employee’s tenure and work location in BambooHR, applies severance policy to determine eligibility and calculate severance, and, when severance is due, uses AI to draft a separation agreement using the termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context.
If the departure is voluntary, the workflow sends the employee a direct message in Slack with an offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey.

When an exit survey is submitted through the survey form, the workflow enriches the response with employee data from BambooHR and then uses AI to generate a concise summary of the feedback along with recommended action steps.
If the exit survey indicates that the employee wants an exit interview, the workflow notifies the assigned People Business Partner with the employee context and requested follow-up.

For each offboarding case, the workflow creates a backfill tracking record in Airtable for Talent Acquisition, and later interprets Slack emoji reactions on the tracked item to update the backfill status according to predefined status rules.

If the involuntary termination results in severance, the workflow prepares severance payment tracking details and updates BambooHR with the payment information and severance status; if no severance is due, it marks the case accordingly.

When a farewell message is submitted, the workflow routes it for review in Slack according to the required approval path, records approval or rejection decisions, and only posts the message to Slack after it has been approved; rejected or edit-requested messages are retained with their review history instead of being posted.

modifications.intent: For the simple goodbye notes headed to #company-announcements, we don't need to make a whole review stop out of them anymore.

events.input: A manager submits the `Employee Offboarding Request` Google Form for Priya Nair with termination type `involuntary` and last working day `2026-06-14`.

expect.action: The offboarding request for Priya Nair is recorded from the Google Form and classified as an involuntary departure. Slack notifications are sent to the relevant operational teams for HR, IT, and payroll with Priya Nair’s departure details, including involuntary termination and last working day 2026-06-14, plus team-specific follow-up guidance. BambooHR is updated for employee E10247 so Priya Nair’s termination type is set to involuntary and last working day is set to 2026-06-14. Using BambooHR data, the workflow determines Priya Nair is in San Francisco, CA and has tenure exceeding 60 months, so severance is calculated under policy as 8 weeks with United States location rules applied. An AI-drafted separation agreement is produced for Priya Nair using the termination details, severance inputs, and U.S. jurisdiction context. A backfill tracking record is created in Airtable for Priya Nair for Talent Acquisition. BambooHR is updated with severance payment tracking information and the case is marked as severance due.
expect.reason: An accepted involuntary offboarding request triggers team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, severance eligibility calculation, separation agreement drafting, backfill tracking creation, and severance status recording.

events.input: An employee submits the `Exit Survey Form` for Priya Nair, including written feedback and indicating that an exit interview is requested.

expect.action: The exit survey submission for Priya Nair is enriched with employee data from BambooHR and an AI-generated summary of the feedback is produced with recommended action steps. A notification is sent in Slack to Maya Thompson, the assigned People Business Partner, including Priya Nair’s context and the request to schedule exit interview follow-up.
expect.reason: An exit survey submission triggers feedback summarization, and because the survey requests an exit interview, the assigned People Business Partner is notified.

events.input: A farewell message submission arrives for Priya Nair from manager Daniel Cho, with message content wishing Priya well and requested posting context `#company-announcements`.

expect.action: A farewell message review item is created in Slack for Priya Nair’s message to be approved before posting to #company-announcements, and the submission is retained with its review history pending decision.
expect.reason: Under baseline behavior, farewell messages must go through Slack review and are only posted after approval.

name: Comprehensive Employee Offboarding System

objects.role: Entry-point service for new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received offboarding request submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission arrives, record the submission payload including employee name, termination type, and last working day.

peers.relationship: Forward each new offboarding request submission for policy evaluation and downstream action selection

event_sources: google forms: Employee Offboarding Request submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for Exit Survey Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received exit survey submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Exit Survey Form submission arrives, record the survey payload and any exit interview request flag.

peers.relationship: Forward each exit survey submission for enrichment, summarization, and follow-up decisions

event_sources: google forms: Exit Survey Form submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for farewell message submissions awaiting review.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received farewell message submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, record the message content, submitter, target employee, and requested posting context.

peers.relationship: Forward each farewell message submission for review routing and approval handling

event_sources: form/webhook: farewell message submitted

objects.role: Dual-role Slack service for outbound posts and inbound emoji or approval action events.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Slack messages, DMs, channel posts, and inbound interaction events.
objects.behavior: When asked to send a message, post to the specified Slack destination including #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, #payroll-ops, or an employee DM. When asked to send a review request, post to the specified Slack approval destination. When asked to post an approved farewell, post to the specified Slack channel. When emoji reaction event arrives, forward it to backfill-tracking via peer message. When approval action event arrives, forward it to farewell-approval via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward Slack emoji reaction events related to Backfill Requests tracking updates
Forward Slack approval action events for farewell review decisions

event_sources: slack: emoji reaction added
slack: approval action submitted

objects.role: Read service for BambooHR employee and employment data lookups.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves BambooHR records on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for employee profile, tenure, work location, employment status, or current termination and severance-related fields, return the requested BambooHR data. When answering queries, call the `bamboohr_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Read service for generating drafted documents and summaries from provided prompts.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves generated text on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for a separation agreement draft, generate a draft using the provided termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context. When asked for an exit survey TLDR and action steps, generate concise summary text and recommended actions from the enriched feedback payload. When answering queries, call the `chatgpt-generation_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Write service for recording termination and severance-related updates into BambooHR.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound BambooHR update requests for termination details, severance tracking fields, and related status changes.
objects.behavior: When termination details are received, write the employee termination type and last working day to BambooHR. When severance payment details are received, write the payment tracking details and severance status to BambooHR.

objects.role: Write service for creating and tracking Backfill Requests records in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Airtable record writes for Backfill Requests and subsequent status updates.
objects.behavior: When a backfill request is received, create a tracking record in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base, Backfill Requests table. When a backfill status update is received, update the corresponding Backfill Requests record with the new emoji-derived status.

objects.role: Business logic object that applies offboarding rules to each termination request.
objects.state_description: Tracks active offboarding cases with employee identity, termination type, last working day, notification status, BambooHR update status, voluntary or involuntary branch, and linked downstream tasks.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding request arrives, classify it as voluntary or involuntary using the submitted termination type. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare customized action messages and send to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a termination update for BambooHR. When the departure is voluntary, prepare a Slack DM to the employee with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link. When the departure is involuntary, request employee tenure and work location data needed for severance evaluation. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a backfill tracking request for Talent Acquisition.

peers.relationship: Send customized offboarding action messages to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops, and send voluntary-departure DM content to the employee
Send termination details for BambooHR recording
Send involuntary termination cases for severance evaluation
Send accepted offboarding cases to create and manage backfill tracking

objects.role: Business logic object that applies severance rules and prepares separation-agreement inputs.
objects.state_description: Tracks involuntary termination cases with tenure, work location, severance eligibility, severance amount, agreement draft status, and payment tracking requirements.
objects.behavior: When an involuntary termination case arrives, use tenure and work location to determine severance eligibility and calculate severance according to policy. When severance is due, prepare structured inputs for a separation agreement draft. When severance is due, prepare severance tracking details for BambooHR. When severance is not due, mark the case as no-severance-required.

peers.relationship: Request employee tenure, work location, and related employment facts needed for severance calculation
Request a separation agreement draft for eligible severance cases
Send severance payment tracking details and severance status for BambooHR recording

objects.role: Business logic object that enriches exit survey responses and determines follow-up actions.
objects.state_description: Tracks exit survey cases with raw responses, enriched employee context, generated TLDR, recommended action steps, exit interview request status, and notification status.
objects.behavior: When an exit survey submission arrives, enrich the feedback with BambooHR employee data. When enriched feedback is available, prepare a TLDR and action steps. When the survey indicates an exit interview request, identify that follow-up is required and prepare a notification for the assigned People Business Partner.

peers.relationship: Request BambooHR context needed to enrich exit survey feedback
Request TLDR and action-step generation from enriched exit feedback
Send exit interview request notifications for the assigned People Business Partner

objects.role: Business logic object that manages backfill request creation and Slack-emoji-driven status interpretation.
objects.state_description: Tracks backfill cases with employee departure context, Airtable record linkage, Talent Acquisition status, and most recent Slack emoji-derived signal.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding case arrives, prepare a Backfill Requests record with employee and vacancy context. When a Slack emoji reaction event arrives for a tracked backfill item, interpret the emoji according to backfill status rules and prepare the corresponding Airtable status update.

peers.relationship: Send new Backfill Requests records and emoji-derived status updates to Airtable

objects.role: Business logic object that applies review and approval rules to farewell messages before posting.
objects.state_description: Tracks farewell message submissions with review status, approver routing, decision history, approved content, and posting status.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, determine the required review path and prepare a review request. When an approval action arrives, update the decision status. When a farewell message is approved, prepare the approved message for posting to Slack. When a farewell message is rejected or needs edits, mark the submission accordingly and retain the review history.

peers.relationship: Send farewell review requests to the Slack approval destination and send approved farewell messages for posting to the designated Slack channel

objects.role: Write service for notifying the assigned People Business Partner about requested exit interviews.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound People Business Partner notifications and delivery attempts.
objects.behavior: When an exit interview request notification is received, send the notification to the assigned People Business Partner with employee context and requested follow-up.

steps: When an employee offboarding request is submitted through Google Forms, the workflow records the employee name, termination type, and last working day, then classifies the departure as voluntary or involuntary based on the submitted termination type.

For every accepted offboarding request, the workflow immediately sends customized Slack notifications to the relevant operational teams, including HR, IT, and payroll, with team-specific action guidance tied to the departure details.
After intake, the workflow writes the termination information into BambooHR, updating the employee’s termination type and last working day.

If the termination is involuntary, the workflow looks up the employee’s tenure and work location in BambooHR, applies severance policy to determine eligibility and calculate severance, and, when severance is due, uses AI to draft a separation agreement using the termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context.
If the departure is voluntary, the workflow sends the employee a direct message in Slack with an offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey.

When an exit survey is submitted through the survey form, the workflow enriches the response with employee data from BambooHR and then uses AI to generate a concise summary of the feedback along with recommended action steps.
If the exit survey indicates that the employee wants an exit interview, the workflow notifies the assigned People Business Partner with the employee context and requested follow-up.

For each offboarding case, the workflow creates a backfill tracking record in Airtable for Talent Acquisition, and later interprets Slack emoji reactions on the tracked item to update the backfill status according to predefined status rules.

If the involuntary termination results in severance, the workflow prepares severance payment tracking details and updates BambooHR with the payment information and severance status; if no severance is due, it marks the case accordingly.

When a farewell message is submitted, the workflow routes it for review in Slack according to the required approval path, records approval or rejection decisions, and only posts the message to Slack after it has been approved; rejected or edit-requested messages are retained with their review history instead of being posted.

modifications.intent: Through Friday, for voluntary departures, hold the Slack DM to the employee with the offboarding guide and exit survey link, but keep the HR, IT, payroll, BambooHR, and backfill steps running as usual.

Based on BambooHR hire date 2021-03-08 and San Francisco, CA location, severance is determined to be due under the active severance policy at 4 weeks, and an AI-drafted separation agreement is produced using Priya Nair’s termination details and U.S. jurisdiction context. Airtable receives a new backfill tracking record for Priya Nair for Talent Acquisition. BambooHR is updated with severance payment tracking information and severance status marked as due / in tracking.

name: Comprehensive Employee Offboarding System

objects.role: Entry-point service for new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received offboarding request submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission arrives, record the submission payload including employee name, termination type, and last working day.

peers.relationship: Forward each new offboarding request submission for policy evaluation and downstream action selection

event_sources: google forms: Employee Offboarding Request submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for Exit Survey Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received exit survey submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Exit Survey Form submission arrives, record the survey payload and any exit interview request flag.

peers.relationship: Forward each exit survey submission for enrichment, summarization, and follow-up decisions

event_sources: google forms: Exit Survey Form submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for farewell message submissions awaiting review.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received farewell message submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, record the message content, submitter, target employee, and requested posting context.

peers.relationship: Forward each farewell message submission for review routing and approval handling

event_sources: form/webhook: farewell message submitted

objects.role: Dual-role Slack service for outbound posts and inbound emoji or approval action events.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Slack messages, DMs, channel posts, and inbound interaction events.
objects.behavior: When asked to send a message, post to the specified Slack destination including #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, #payroll-ops, or an employee DM. When asked to send a review request, post to the specified Slack approval destination. When asked to post an approved farewell, post to the specified Slack channel. When emoji reaction event arrives, forward it to backfill-tracking via peer message. When approval action event arrives, forward it to farewell-approval via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward Slack emoji reaction events related to Backfill Requests tracking updates
Forward Slack approval action events for farewell review decisions

event_sources: slack: emoji reaction added
slack: approval action submitted

objects.role: Read service for BambooHR employee and employment data lookups.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves BambooHR records on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for employee profile, tenure, work location, employment status, or current termination and severance-related fields, return the requested BambooHR data. When answering queries, call the `bamboohr_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Read service for generating drafted documents and summaries from provided prompts.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves generated text on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for a separation agreement draft, generate a draft using the provided termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context. When asked for an exit survey TLDR and action steps, generate concise summary text and recommended actions from the enriched feedback payload. When answering queries, call the `chatgpt-generation_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Write service for recording termination and severance-related updates into BambooHR.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound BambooHR update requests for termination details, severance tracking fields, and related status changes.
objects.behavior: When termination details are received, write the employee termination type and last working day to BambooHR. When severance payment details are received, write the payment tracking details and severance status to BambooHR.

objects.role: Write service for creating and tracking Backfill Requests records in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Airtable record writes for Backfill Requests and subsequent status updates.
objects.behavior: When a backfill request is received, create a tracking record in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base, Backfill Requests table. When a backfill status update is received, update the corresponding Backfill Requests record with the new emoji-derived status.

objects.role: Business logic object that applies offboarding rules to each termination request.
objects.state_description: Tracks active offboarding cases with employee identity, termination type, last working day, notification status, BambooHR update status, voluntary or involuntary branch, and linked downstream tasks.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding request arrives, classify it as voluntary or involuntary using the submitted termination type. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare customized action messages and send to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a termination update for BambooHR. When the departure is voluntary, prepare a Slack DM to the employee with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link. When the departure is involuntary, request employee tenure and work location data needed for severance evaluation. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a backfill tracking request for Talent Acquisition.

peers.relationship: Send customized offboarding action messages to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops, and send voluntary-departure DM content to the employee
Send termination details for BambooHR recording
Send involuntary termination cases for severance evaluation
Send accepted offboarding cases to create and manage backfill tracking

objects.role: Business logic object that applies severance rules and prepares separation-agreement inputs.
objects.state_description: Tracks involuntary termination cases with tenure, work location, severance eligibility, severance amount, agreement draft status, and payment tracking requirements.
objects.behavior: When an involuntary termination case arrives, use tenure and work location to determine severance eligibility and calculate severance according to policy. When severance is due, prepare structured inputs for a separation agreement draft. When severance is due, prepare severance tracking details for BambooHR. When severance is not due, mark the case as no-severance-required.

peers.relationship: Request employee tenure, work location, and related employment facts needed for severance calculation
Request a separation agreement draft for eligible severance cases
Send severance payment tracking details and severance status for BambooHR recording

objects.role: Business logic object that enriches exit survey responses and determines follow-up actions.
objects.state_description: Tracks exit survey cases with raw responses, enriched employee context, generated TLDR, recommended action steps, exit interview request status, and notification status.
objects.behavior: When an exit survey submission arrives, enrich the feedback with BambooHR employee data. When enriched feedback is available, prepare a TLDR and action steps. When the survey indicates an exit interview request, identify that follow-up is required and prepare a notification for the assigned People Business Partner.

peers.relationship: Request BambooHR context needed to enrich exit survey feedback
Request TLDR and action-step generation from enriched exit feedback
Send exit interview request notifications for the assigned People Business Partner

objects.role: Business logic object that manages backfill request creation and Slack-emoji-driven status interpretation.
objects.state_description: Tracks backfill cases with employee departure context, Airtable record linkage, Talent Acquisition status, and most recent Slack emoji-derived signal.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding case arrives, prepare a Backfill Requests record with employee and vacancy context. When a Slack emoji reaction event arrives for a tracked backfill item, interpret the emoji according to backfill status rules and prepare the corresponding Airtable status update.

peers.relationship: Send new Backfill Requests records and emoji-derived status updates to Airtable

objects.role: Business logic object that applies review and approval rules to farewell messages before posting.
objects.state_description: Tracks farewell message submissions with review status, approver routing, decision history, approved content, and posting status.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, determine the required review path and prepare a review request. When an approval action arrives, update the decision status. When a farewell message is approved, prepare the approved message for posting to Slack. When a farewell message is rejected or needs edits, mark the submission accordingly and retain the review history.

peers.relationship: Send farewell review requests to the Slack approval destination and send approved farewell messages for posting to the designated Slack channel

objects.role: Write service for notifying the assigned People Business Partner about requested exit interviews.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound People Business Partner notifications and delivery attempts.
objects.behavior: When an exit interview request notification is received, send the notification to the assigned People Business Partner with employee context and requested follow-up.

steps: When an employee offboarding request is submitted through Google Forms, the workflow records the employee name, termination type, and last working day, then classifies the departure as voluntary or involuntary based on the submitted termination type.

For every accepted offboarding request, the workflow immediately sends customized Slack notifications to the relevant operational teams, including HR, IT, and payroll, with team-specific action guidance tied to the departure details.
After intake, the workflow writes the termination information into BambooHR, updating the employee’s termination type and last working day.

If the termination is involuntary, the workflow looks up the employee’s tenure and work location in BambooHR, applies severance policy to determine eligibility and calculate severance, and, when severance is due, uses AI to draft a separation agreement using the termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context.
If the departure is voluntary, the workflow sends the employee a direct message in Slack with an offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey.

When an exit survey is submitted through the survey form, the workflow enriches the response with employee data from BambooHR and then uses AI to generate a concise summary of the feedback along with recommended action steps.
If the exit survey indicates that the employee wants an exit interview, the workflow notifies the assigned People Business Partner with the employee context and requested follow-up.

For each offboarding case, the workflow creates a backfill tracking record in Airtable for Talent Acquisition, and later interprets Slack emoji reactions on the tracked item to update the backfill status according to predefined status rules.

If the involuntary termination results in severance, the workflow prepares severance payment tracking details and updates BambooHR with the payment information and severance status; if no severance is due, it marks the case accordingly.

When a farewell message is submitted, the workflow routes it for review in Slack according to the required approval path, records approval or rejection decisions, and only posts the message to Slack after it has been approved; rejected or edit-requested messages are retained with their review history instead of being posted.

modifications.intent: Correction: for voluntary offboarding requests, send the Slack DM with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link only when the submitted last working day is later than the submission date. If the last working day is the same calendar day as the request submission, do not send that employee DM, but continue sending the standard #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops messages, continue writing the termination details to BambooHR, and continue creating the backfill tracking request.

events.input: A manager submits the `Employee Offboarding Request` Google Form for Priya Nair with termination type `involuntary` and last working day `2026-06-14`.

expect.action: The offboarding request for Priya Nair is recorded from the Google Form and classified as an involuntary departure. Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll operational teams with Priya Nair’s name, involuntary termination type, and last working day of 2026-06-14 plus team-specific action guidance. BambooHR is updated for employee E10247, Priya Nair, with termination type set to involuntary and last working day set to 2026-06-14. Using BambooHR data for Priya Nair, the workflow determines that severance review applies for an involuntary termination and prepares a severance determination using her tenure and San Francisco, CA location; because severance is due under policy, an AI-drafted separation agreement is produced using the termination details and jurisdiction context. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Talent Acquisition for Priya Nair’s role.
expect.reason: An offboarding request triggers intake, team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, involuntary severance handling, and backfill creation.

events.input: An employee submits the `Exit Survey Form` for Priya Nair, including written feedback and indicating that an exit interview is requested.

expect.action: The exit survey submission for Priya Nair is enriched with BambooHR employee data and an AI-generated summary of her feedback is produced with recommended action steps. A Slack notification is sent to Maya Thompson, the assigned People Business Partner, including Priya Nair’s employee context and the request to schedule an exit interview.
expect.reason: An exit survey submission triggers feedback summarization, and a People Business Partner is notified when the survey requests an exit interview.

events.input: A farewell message submission arrives for Priya Nair from manager Daniel Cho, with message content wishing Priya well and requested posting context `#company-announcements`.

expect.action: A farewell message review request for Priya Nair is sent in Slack through the required approval path, and the submission is recorded as pending review with its requested posting context of #company-announcements and full message content. The message is not posted to #company-announcements at this stage because posting occurs only after approval.
expect.reason: Farewell messages are routed for Slack approval and retained with review status until an approver decision is received.

name: Comprehensive Employee Offboarding System

objects.role: Entry-point service for new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received offboarding request submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission arrives, record the submission payload including employee name, termination type, and last working day.

peers.relationship: Forward each new offboarding request submission for policy evaluation and downstream action selection

event_sources: google forms: Employee Offboarding Request submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for Exit Survey Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received exit survey submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Exit Survey Form submission arrives, record the survey payload and any exit interview request flag.

peers.relationship: Forward each exit survey submission for enrichment, summarization, and follow-up decisions

event_sources: google forms: Exit Survey Form submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for farewell message submissions awaiting review.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received farewell message submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, record the message content, submitter, target employee, and requested posting context.

peers.relationship: Forward each farewell message submission for review routing and approval handling

event_sources: form/webhook: farewell message submitted

objects.role: Dual-role Slack service for outbound posts and inbound emoji or approval action events.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Slack messages, DMs, channel posts, and inbound interaction events.
objects.behavior: When asked to send a message, post to the specified Slack destination including #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, #payroll-ops, or an employee DM. When asked to send a review request, post to the specified Slack approval destination. When asked to post an approved farewell, post to the specified Slack channel. When emoji reaction event arrives, forward it to backfill-tracking via peer message. When approval action event arrives, forward it to farewell-approval via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward Slack emoji reaction events related to Backfill Requests tracking updates
Forward Slack approval action events for farewell review decisions

event_sources: slack: emoji reaction added
slack: approval action submitted

objects.role: Read service for BambooHR employee and employment data lookups.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves BambooHR records on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for employee profile, tenure, work location, employment status, or current termination and severance-related fields, return the requested BambooHR data. When answering queries, call the `bamboohr_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Read service for generating drafted documents and summaries from provided prompts.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves generated text on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for a separation agreement draft, generate a draft using the provided termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context. When asked for an exit survey TLDR and action steps, generate concise summary text and recommended actions from the enriched feedback payload. When answering queries, call the `chatgpt-generation_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Write service for recording termination and severance-related updates into BambooHR.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound BambooHR update requests for termination details, severance tracking fields, and related status changes.
objects.behavior: When termination details are received, write the employee termination type and last working day to BambooHR. When severance payment details are received, write the payment tracking details and severance status to BambooHR.

objects.role: Write service for creating and tracking Backfill Requests records in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Airtable record writes for Backfill Requests and subsequent status updates.
objects.behavior: When a backfill request is received, create a tracking record in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base, Backfill Requests table. When a backfill status update is received, update the corresponding Backfill Requests record with the new emoji-derived status.

objects.role: Business logic object that applies offboarding rules to each termination request.
objects.state_description: Tracks active offboarding cases with employee identity, termination type, last working day, notification status, BambooHR update status, voluntary or involuntary branch, and linked downstream tasks.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding request arrives, classify it as voluntary or involuntary using the submitted termination type. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare customized action messages and send to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a termination update for BambooHR. When the departure is voluntary, prepare a Slack DM to the employee with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link. When the departure is involuntary, request employee tenure and work location data needed for severance evaluation. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a backfill tracking request for Talent Acquisition.

peers.relationship: Send customized offboarding action messages to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops, and send voluntary-departure DM content to the employee
Send termination details for BambooHR recording
Send involuntary termination cases for severance evaluation
Send accepted offboarding cases to create and manage backfill tracking

objects.role: Business logic object that applies severance rules and prepares separation-agreement inputs.
objects.state_description: Tracks involuntary termination cases with tenure, work location, severance eligibility, severance amount, agreement draft status, and payment tracking requirements.
objects.behavior: When an involuntary termination case arrives, use tenure and work location to determine severance eligibility and calculate severance according to policy. When severance is due, prepare structured inputs for a separation agreement draft. When severance is due, prepare severance tracking details for BambooHR. When severance is not due, mark the case as no-severance-required.

peers.relationship: Request employee tenure, work location, and related employment facts needed for severance calculation
Request a separation agreement draft for eligible severance cases
Send severance payment tracking details and severance status for BambooHR recording

objects.role: Business logic object that enriches exit survey responses and determines follow-up actions.
objects.state_description: Tracks exit survey cases with raw responses, enriched employee context, generated TLDR, recommended action steps, exit interview request status, and notification status.
objects.behavior: When an exit survey submission arrives, enrich the feedback with BambooHR employee data. When enriched feedback is available, prepare a TLDR and action steps. When the survey indicates an exit interview request, identify that follow-up is required and prepare a notification for the assigned People Business Partner.

peers.relationship: Request BambooHR context needed to enrich exit survey feedback
Request TLDR and action-step generation from enriched exit feedback
Send exit interview request notifications for the assigned People Business Partner

objects.role: Business logic object that manages backfill request creation and Slack-emoji-driven status interpretation.
objects.state_description: Tracks backfill cases with employee departure context, Airtable record linkage, Talent Acquisition status, and most recent Slack emoji-derived signal.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding case arrives, prepare a Backfill Requests record with employee and vacancy context. When a Slack emoji reaction event arrives for a tracked backfill item, interpret the emoji according to backfill status rules and prepare the corresponding Airtable status update.

peers.relationship: Send new Backfill Requests records and emoji-derived status updates to Airtable

objects.role: Business logic object that applies review and approval rules to farewell messages before posting.
objects.state_description: Tracks farewell message submissions with review status, approver routing, decision history, approved content, and posting status.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, determine the required review path and prepare a review request. When an approval action arrives, update the decision status. When a farewell message is approved, prepare the approved message for posting to Slack. When a farewell message is rejected or needs edits, mark the submission accordingly and retain the review history.

peers.relationship: Send farewell review requests to the Slack approval destination and send approved farewell messages for posting to the designated Slack channel

objects.role: Write service for notifying the assigned People Business Partner about requested exit interviews.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound People Business Partner notifications and delivery attempts.
objects.behavior: When an exit interview request notification is received, send the notification to the assigned People Business Partner with employee context and requested follow-up.

steps: When an employee offboarding request is submitted through Google Forms, the workflow records the employee name, termination type, and last working day, then classifies the departure as voluntary or involuntary based on the submitted termination type.

For every accepted offboarding request, the workflow immediately sends customized Slack notifications to the relevant operational teams, including HR, IT, and payroll, with team-specific action guidance tied to the departure details.
After intake, the workflow writes the termination information into BambooHR, updating the employee’s termination type and last working day.

If the termination is involuntary, the workflow looks up the employee’s tenure and work location in BambooHR, applies severance policy to determine eligibility and calculate severance, and, when severance is due, uses AI to draft a separation agreement using the termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context.
If the departure is voluntary, the workflow sends the employee a direct message in Slack with an offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey.

When an exit survey is submitted through the survey form, the workflow enriches the response with employee data from BambooHR and then uses AI to generate a concise summary of the feedback along with recommended action steps.
If the exit survey indicates that the employee wants an exit interview, the workflow notifies the assigned People Business Partner with the employee context and requested follow-up.

For each offboarding case, the workflow creates a backfill tracking record in Airtable for Talent Acquisition, and later interprets Slack emoji reactions on the tracked item to update the backfill status according to predefined status rules.

If the involuntary termination results in severance, the workflow prepares severance payment tracking details and updates BambooHR with the payment information and severance status; if no severance is due, it marks the case accordingly.

When a farewell message is submitted, the workflow routes it for review in Slack according to the required approval path, records approval or rejection decisions, and only posts the message to Slack after it has been approved; rejected or edit-requested messages are retained with their review history instead of being posted.

modifications.intent: Stop sending the employee offboarding guide and exit survey link to people who are leaving voluntarily.

events.input: A manager submits the `Employee Offboarding Request` Google Form for Priya Nair with termination type `involuntary` and last working day `2026-06-14`.

expect.action: Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll teams with Priya Nair’s offboarding details, including that the termination is involuntary and the last working day is 2026-06-14, with team-specific action guidance. BambooHR is updated for Priya Nair to record termination type = involuntary and last working day = 2026-06-14. Because Priya Nair is an involuntary termination and BambooHR shows hire date 2021-03-08 and location San Francisco, CA, severance is determined under policy as eligible at 4 weeks, and a separation agreement draft is generated using the termination details and U.S. jurisdiction context. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Priya Nair for Talent Acquisition. BambooHR is updated with severance payment tracking information and severance status showing severance is due.
expect.reason: An accepted offboarding request triggers team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, involuntary severance evaluation and document drafting, backfill record creation, and severance tracking updates.

events.input: An employee submits the `Exit Survey Form` for Priya Nair, including written feedback and indicating that an exit interview is requested.

expect.action: The exit survey response for Priya Nair is enriched with employee data from BambooHR, and an AI-generated summary of the feedback with recommended action steps is produced. A Slack notification is sent to Maya Thompson, the assigned People Business Partner, with Priya Nair’s context and the request to follow up for an exit interview.
expect.reason: An exit survey submission triggers feedback summarization, and an affirmative exit interview request triggers notification to the assigned People Business Partner.

events.input: A farewell message submission arrives for Priya Nair from manager Daniel Cho, with message content wishing Priya well and requested posting context `#company-announcements`.

expect.action: A Slack approval request for Priya Nair’s farewell message is sent into the required review path for the requested posting context #company-announcements, and the submission enters review without being posted to Slack yet.
expect.reason: Farewell messages must be routed for approval and are only posted after approval, so the terminal output from submission is the review request.

events.input: Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission received. Submission ID: OFF-2026-0201. Submitted by manager Lena Ortiz for employee Marcus Hill. Termination type: voluntary. Last working day: 2026-06-18. Department: Sales. Manager email: lena.ortiz@example.com. Employee email: marcus.hill@example.com. Notes: Marcus gave notice and will work through transition plan.

expect.action: Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll teams with Marcus Hill’s offboarding details, including that the departure is voluntary and the last working day is 2026-06-18, with team-specific action guidance. BambooHR is updated to record Marcus Hill’s termination type = voluntary and last working day = 2026-06-18. A direct Slack message is sent to Marcus Hill with the offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Marcus Hill for Talent Acquisition.
expect.reason: Under baseline behavior, an accepted voluntary offboarding request triggers operational team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, a Slack offboarding guide and exit survey message to the employee, and backfill tracking creation.

events.input: Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission received. Submission ID: OFF-2026-0202. Submitted by manager Daniel Cho for employee Nina Patel. Termination type: voluntary. Last working day: 2026-06-21. Department: Marketing. Manager email: daniel.cho@example.com. Employee email: nina.patel@example.com. Notes: Nina accepted a role elsewhere and requested a smooth handoff.

expect.action: Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll teams with Nina Patel’s offboarding details, including that the departure is voluntary and the last working day is 2026-06-21, with team-specific action guidance. BambooHR is updated to record Nina Patel’s termination type = voluntary and last working day = 2026-06-21. [suppressed by M001] A direct Slack message to Nina Patel with the offboarding guide and exit survey link is not produced. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Nina Patel for Talent Acquisition.
expect.reason: Voluntary offboarding still triggers team notifications, BambooHR updates, and backfill tracking, but M001 stops sending the employee offboarding guide and exit survey link to people leaving voluntarily.

events.input: Exit Survey Form submission received. Submission ID: EXIT-2026-0441. Employee: Nina Patel. Employee email: nina.patel@example.com. Responses: 'I appreciated the team and growth opportunities, but I wanted a role with broader scope.' Exit interview requested: yes. Preferred contact note: available Wednesday afternoon.

expect.action: The exit survey response for Nina Patel is enriched with employee data from BambooHR, and an AI-generated summary of the feedback with recommended action steps is produced. A Slack notification is sent to the assigned People Business Partner requesting exit interview follow-up for Nina Patel, including the employee context and the note that the employee is available Wednesday afternoon.
expect.reason: An exit survey submission triggers feedback summarization, and because the survey requests an exit interview, the assigned People Business Partner is notified for follow-up.

Last working day: 2026-06-25. Department: Finance. Manager email: priyanka.bose@example.com. Employee email: omar.rahman@example.com. Notes: Omar is relocating and submitted formal resignation.

BambooHR is updated to record Omar Rahman’s termination type = voluntary and last working day = 2026-06-25. name: Comprehensive Employee Offboarding System

objects.role: Entry-point service for new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received offboarding request submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission arrives, record the submission payload including employee name, termination type, and last working day.

peers.relationship: Forward each new offboarding request submission for policy evaluation and downstream action selection

event_sources: google forms: Employee Offboarding Request submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for Exit Survey Form submissions.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received exit survey submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a new Exit Survey Form submission arrives, record the survey payload and any exit interview request flag.

peers.relationship: Forward each exit survey submission for enrichment, summarization, and follow-up decisions

event_sources: google forms: Exit Survey Form submitted

objects.role: Entry-point service for farewell message submissions awaiting review.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of received farewell message submissions and forwarding attempts.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, record the message content, submitter, target employee, and requested posting context.

peers.relationship: Forward each farewell message submission for review routing and approval handling

event_sources: form/webhook: farewell message submitted

objects.role: Dual-role Slack service for outbound posts and inbound emoji or approval action events.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Slack messages, DMs, channel posts, and inbound interaction events.
objects.behavior: When asked to send a message, post to the specified Slack destination including #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, #payroll-ops, or an employee DM. When asked to send a review request, post to the specified Slack approval destination. When asked to post an approved farewell, post to the specified Slack channel. When emoji reaction event arrives, forward it to backfill-tracking via peer message. When approval action event arrives, forward it to farewell-approval via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward Slack emoji reaction events related to Backfill Requests tracking updates
Forward Slack approval action events for farewell review decisions

event_sources: slack: emoji reaction added
slack: approval action submitted

objects.role: Read service for BambooHR employee and employment data lookups.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves BambooHR records on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for employee profile, tenure, work location, employment status, or current termination and severance-related fields, return the requested BambooHR data. When answering queries, call the `bamboohr_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Read service for generating drafted documents and summaries from provided prompts.
objects.state_description: Holds no persistent state; retrieves generated text on demand.
objects.behavior: When asked for a separation agreement draft, generate a draft using the provided termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context. When asked for an exit survey TLDR and action steps, generate concise summary text and recommended actions from the enriched feedback payload. When answering queries, call the `chatgpt-generation_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Write service for recording termination and severance-related updates into BambooHR.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound BambooHR update requests for termination details, severance tracking fields, and related status changes.
objects.behavior: When termination details are received, write the employee termination type and last working day to BambooHR. When severance payment details are received, write the payment tracking details and severance status to BambooHR.

objects.role: Write service for creating and tracking Backfill Requests records in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound Airtable record writes for Backfill Requests and subsequent status updates.
objects.behavior: When a backfill request is received, create a tracking record in the Offboarding Backfills Airtable base, Backfill Requests table. When a backfill status update is received, update the corresponding Backfill Requests record with the new emoji-derived status.

objects.role: Business logic object that applies offboarding rules to each termination request.
objects.state_description: Tracks active offboarding cases with employee identity, termination type, last working day, notification status, BambooHR update status, voluntary or involuntary branch, and linked downstream tasks.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding request arrives, classify it as voluntary or involuntary using the submitted termination type. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare customized action messages and send to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a termination update for BambooHR. When the departure is voluntary, prepare a Slack DM to the employee with the Employee Offboarding Guide and Exit Survey Form link. When the departure is involuntary, request employee tenure and work location data needed for severance evaluation. When any offboarding request is accepted, prepare a backfill tracking request for Talent Acquisition.

peers.relationship: Send customized offboarding action messages to #hr-operations, #it-helpdesk, and #payroll-ops, and send voluntary-departure DM content to the employee
Send termination details for BambooHR recording
Send involuntary termination cases for severance evaluation
Send accepted offboarding cases to create and manage backfill tracking

objects.role: Business logic object that applies severance rules and prepares separation-agreement inputs.
objects.state_description: Tracks involuntary termination cases with tenure, work location, severance eligibility, severance amount, agreement draft status, and payment tracking requirements.
objects.behavior: When an involuntary termination case arrives, use tenure and work location to determine severance eligibility and calculate severance according to policy. When severance is due, prepare structured inputs for a separation agreement draft. When severance is due, prepare severance tracking details for BambooHR. When severance is not due, mark the case as no-severance-required.

peers.relationship: Request employee tenure, work location, and related employment facts needed for severance calculation
Request a separation agreement draft for eligible severance cases
Send severance payment tracking details and severance status for BambooHR recording

objects.role: Business logic object that enriches exit survey responses and determines follow-up actions.
objects.state_description: Tracks exit survey cases with raw responses, enriched employee context, generated TLDR, recommended action steps, exit interview request status, and notification status.
objects.behavior: When an exit survey submission arrives, enrich the feedback with BambooHR employee data. When enriched feedback is available, prepare a TLDR and action steps. When the survey indicates an exit interview request, identify that follow-up is required and prepare a notification for the assigned People Business Partner.

peers.relationship: Request BambooHR context needed to enrich exit survey feedback
Request TLDR and action-step generation from enriched exit feedback
Send exit interview request notifications for the assigned People Business Partner

objects.role: Business logic object that manages backfill request creation and Slack-emoji-driven status interpretation.
objects.state_description: Tracks backfill cases with employee departure context, Airtable record linkage, Talent Acquisition status, and most recent Slack emoji-derived signal.
objects.behavior: When a new offboarding case arrives, prepare a Backfill Requests record with employee and vacancy context. When a Slack emoji reaction event arrives for a tracked backfill item, interpret the emoji according to backfill status rules and prepare the corresponding Airtable status update.

peers.relationship: Send new Backfill Requests records and emoji-derived status updates to Airtable

objects.role: Business logic object that applies review and approval rules to farewell messages before posting.
objects.state_description: Tracks farewell message submissions with review status, approver routing, decision history, approved content, and posting status.
objects.behavior: When a farewell message submission arrives, determine the required review path and prepare a review request. When an approval action arrives, update the decision status. When a farewell message is approved, prepare the approved message for posting to Slack. When a farewell message is rejected or needs edits, mark the submission accordingly and retain the review history.

peers.relationship: Send farewell review requests to the Slack approval destination and send approved farewell messages for posting to the designated Slack channel

objects.role: Write service for notifying the assigned People Business Partner about requested exit interviews.
objects.state_description: Stores an audit trail of outbound People Business Partner notifications and delivery attempts.
objects.behavior: When an exit interview request notification is received, send the notification to the assigned People Business Partner with employee context and requested follow-up.

steps: When an employee offboarding request is submitted through Google Forms, the workflow records the employee name, termination type, and last working day, then classifies the departure as voluntary or involuntary based on the submitted termination type.

For every accepted offboarding request, the workflow immediately sends customized Slack notifications to the relevant operational teams, including HR, IT, and payroll, with team-specific action guidance tied to the departure details.
After intake, the workflow writes the termination information into BambooHR, updating the employee’s termination type and last working day.

If the termination is involuntary, the workflow looks up the employee’s tenure and work location in BambooHR, applies severance policy to determine eligibility and calculate severance, and, when severance is due, uses AI to draft a separation agreement using the termination details, severance inputs, and jurisdiction context.
If the departure is voluntary, the workflow sends the employee a direct message in Slack with an offboarding guide and a link to the exit survey.

When an exit survey is submitted through the survey form, the workflow enriches the response with employee data from BambooHR and then uses AI to generate a concise summary of the feedback along with recommended action steps.
If the exit survey indicates that the employee wants an exit interview, the workflow notifies the assigned People Business Partner with the employee context and requested follow-up.

For each offboarding case, the workflow creates a backfill tracking record in Airtable for Talent Acquisition, and later interprets Slack emoji reactions on the tracked item to update the backfill status according to predefined status rules.

If the involuntary termination results in severance, the workflow prepares severance payment tracking details and updates BambooHR with the payment information and severance status; if no severance is due, it marks the case accordingly.

When a farewell message is submitted, the workflow routes it for review in Slack according to the required approval path, records approval or rejection decisions, and only posts the message to Slack after it has been approved; rejected or edit-requested messages are retained with their review history instead of being posted.

modifications.intent: For voluntary departures, also include a short prompt in the employee Slack DM inviting them to submit a farewell message for review, in addition to the existing offboarding guide and exit survey link.

events.input: A manager submits the `Employee Offboarding Request` Google Form for Priya Nair with termination type `involuntary` and last working day `2026-06-14`.

expect.action: Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll teams with Priya Nair’s involuntary departure details, including last working day 2026-06-14 and team-specific offboarding actions. BambooHR is updated for Priya Nair to record termination type as involuntary and last working day as 2026-06-14. A severance determination is produced using Priya Nair’s BambooHR tenure and San Francisco, CA location, and because she is eligible, an AI-drafted separation agreement is generated using the termination details, severance inputs, and U.S. jurisdiction context. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Priya Nair for Talent Acquisition. BambooHR is updated with severance payment tracking information and severance status showing severance is due.
expect.reason: An offboarding request was submitted for an involuntary termination, which triggers team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, severance evaluation and agreement drafting, backfill creation, and severance tracking updates.

events.input: An employee submits the `Exit Survey Form` for Priya Nair, including written feedback and indicating that an exit interview is requested.

expect.action: The exit survey response for Priya Nair is enriched with employee data from BambooHR, and an AI-generated summary of her feedback with recommended action steps is produced. A Slack notification is sent to Maya Thompson, the assigned People Business Partner, with Priya Nair’s context and the request to schedule an exit interview.
expect.reason: An exit survey was submitted and it indicates an exit interview is requested, which triggers survey summarization and notification to the assigned People Business Partner.

events.input: A farewell message submission arrives for Priya Nair from manager Daniel Cho, with message content wishing Priya well and requested posting context `#company-announcements`.

expect.action: A Slack approval request is sent for Priya Nair’s farewell message following the required review path, and the message is held pending approval rather than being posted to #company-announcements.
expect.reason: A farewell message submission must be routed for review and only becomes a posted Slack message after approvers make a later approval decision.

events.input: Employee Offboarding Request Google Form submission received. Submission ID: OFF-2026-041. Manager: Lena Ortiz. Employee: Marcus Lee. Employee Slack handle: @marcus. Termination type: voluntary resignation. Last working day: 2026-06-28. Department: Sales. Reason note: accepted external offer.

expect.action: Slack notifications are sent to the HR, IT, and payroll teams with Marcus Lee’s voluntary departure details, including last working day 2026-06-28 and team-specific offboarding actions. BambooHR is updated for Marcus Lee to record the termination type as voluntary and the last working day as 2026-06-28. A Slack direct message is sent to @marcus with the offboarding guide and exit survey link. An Airtable backfill tracking record is created for Marcus Lee for Talent Acquisition.
expect.reason: A voluntary offboarding request triggers operational team notifications, BambooHR termination updates, a Slack DM to the employee with offboarding materials, and creation of a backfill tracking record.
